ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., Actual Cause, Corrective Action, Customer Value, Disposition, Mission/Safety) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., Critical, Major, Minor) */,
  "incident_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the incident */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the person assigned to handle the incident */,
  "incident_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident category */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_category_id") REFERENCES incident_categories ("incident_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being investigated */,
  "investigator" TEXT /* Name of the investigator assigned to the case */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation ended */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the investigation */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Pending) */,
  "investigation_result" TEXT /* Result of the investigation */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident for which the action is taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the action */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "action_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the action (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "action_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action status */,
  "action_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_action_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_category_id") REFERENCES action_categories ("action_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident for which the disposition is recorded */,
  "disposition_description" TEXT /* Description of the final disposition */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the disposition was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the disposition (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "disposition_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disposition category */,
  "disposition_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disposition status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_disposition_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("disposition_category_id") REFERENCES disposition_categories ("disposition_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_value" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer value assessment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being assessed */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact on customer value */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the impact was assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "value_assessment_score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the customer value assessment */,
  "value_assessment_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value assessment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_value_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_value_value_assessment_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_assessment_category_id") REFERENCES value_assessment_categories ("value_assessment_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_safety" (
  "mission_safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission/safety compliance entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being assessed */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission/safety standard being checked */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance status */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant, Pending) */,
  "compliance_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance status */,
  "standard_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_safety_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_safety_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the standard */,
  "standard_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard category */,
  "standard_description_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standards_standard_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_category_id") REFERENCES standard_categories ("standard_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_categories" (
  "incident_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident category */,
  "incident_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident category */,
  "incident_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_categories" (
  "action_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action category */,
  "action_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the action category */,
  "action_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the action category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disposition_categories" (
  "disposition_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition category */,
  "disposition_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the disposition category */,
  "disposition_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the disposition category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_assessment_categories" (
  "value_assessment_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value assessment category */,
  "value_assessment_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the value assessment category */,
  "value_assessment_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the value assessment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_assessment_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_categories" (
  "standard_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard category */,
  "standard_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard category */,
  "standard_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_category_id")
)
